zh.title: 比特币/美元技术分析：高位震荡偏强格局
zh.content:
当前BTC/美元呈高位震荡偏强结构，价格运行在60300附近，整体维持在20日均线59955上方，短线多头仍占优势，但上方60400一线压制明显，市场进入整理蓄势阶段。

MACD指标维持在零轴上方，数值131.91显示动能仍偏多，但信号线缺失使确认度下降。RSI未提供，短线动能略显中性偏强，需观察是否延续放量上行。

支撑位关注59950附近20日均线，其次59500区域；阻力集中在60427历史高点附近，若放量突破或打开至60600上方空间，反之可能回踩整理。

操作上建议以区间思路为主，未突破前高可高抛低吸，激进者可在突破60450后顺势做多，止损设于59900下方，控制波动风险并关注成交量确认。

en.title: Bitcoin vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Bitcoin vs USD is currently consolidating in a very tight intraday range around 60.3k, showing reduced volatility after a mild -0.10% daily change. Price action is hovering just above the 20-day SMA, indicating that broader structure remains slightly constructive despite short-term hesitation. The market is effectively balancing between buyers defending the 60k region and sellers capping upside near recent highs.

Momentum indicators present a mixed but slightly bullish undertone. MACD at 131.91 remains positive, suggesting underlying trend strength, although absence of a clear signal line reading limits confirmation of directional acceleration. RSI is unavailable, reducing short-term overbought/oversold clarity. The sustained position above the 20-day SMA near 59,955 continues to act as dynamic support, implying that pullbacks may still be absorbed by buyers unless momentum decisively weakens.

Immediate support is located at the intraday low around 60,260, followed by stronger structural support at the 20-day SMA near 59,955. A deeper downside extension could expose the 59,500 zone if selling pressure intensifies. On the upside, resistance is concentrated at 60,427, the session high, with a breakout potentially opening room toward 60,750 and the psychological 61,000 level where profit-taking may emerge.

Current conditions favor a range-bound trading approach due to compressed volatility and lack of directional confirmation. Traders may consider accumulating near support zones around 60,260 to 59,955 with tight risk control below the SMA. Alternatively, breakout traders can wait for a sustained move above 60,427 to confirm bullish continuation. Until either boundary is breached, caution is warranted as liquidity remains thin and whipsaws likely in tight range conditions.
